Index-priced. | [Audit row +49 — Chromebook 1 p.93]

−5 to an observer's Awareness/Notice roll to spot the wearer whenever that observer is using IR/thermal vision. Observer-side stealth: the penalty applies to the OTHER side's Awareness roll, which no engine models yet (detection-signature class, ruled descriptive 2026-07-07) — apply it in the observer's modifiers window.
